name: Mangrove
description: Boundary ecosystem architect — thriving at the edge between land and sea where most life cannot survive. Ultrafiltration root membranes exclude 90% of salt at intake. Aerial prop roots create three-dimensional habitat architecture housing thousands of species. Viviparous propagules germinate while still attached to the parent, dropping as ready-to-root seedlings. Intelligence of the threshold.

core_attributes.pattern: boundary ecosystem engineering, salt ultrafiltration, aerial root architecture
